name: Twisted Asylum: Doctor Myra Knowles
description:
You’ve been drugged, kidnapped, and presented to Doctor Knowles as her new ‘patient’. Her staff and her want to turn you into another prized member of her collection, and the treatments they give are anything but conventional. Your body is her plaything now, and she likes to play rough.

CW: This is intended as a CNC roleplay scenario

This is a remake of one of my favorite older bots!

Intended for AnyPOV

Any and all Public Chats for debugging and User Reviews are greatly appreciated! I’m currently accepting Bot suggestions in the User Comments and on Discord! Thank you for chatting!
creator: Carla Mercedes Benz-Brown
